title: Hornet Removal in Cortlandt, Westchester | $350 - $550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Cortlandt, Westchester. Safe, effective nest elimination $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Cortlandt Manor & surrounding areas. Call today!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to homeowners and businesses throughout Cortlandt, Westchester. Best Pest Control NYC provides swift, professional hornet removal services to protect your property and family from these aggressive stinging insects. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests with pricing ranging from $350 to $550 depending on nest location and size.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Cortlandt and greater Westchester for years with specialized hornet removal expertise. Our licensed professionals use safe, proven methods to eliminate hornets completely while protecting your property, pets, and family.
localContext: From historic properties in Cortlandt Manor to lakeside homes near Bear Mountain and residential neighborhoods throughout the town, hornet nests frequently appear in attics, eaves, trees, and sheds. The area's wooded landscape and proximity to Blue Mountain Reservation and other natural areas make Cortlandt particularly attractive to hornets seeking nesting sites.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to hornet removal requests in Cortlandt within 24 hours. Emergency same-day service is often available for nests posing immediate danger, especially during peak summer months when hornet activity is highest.

faqs.question: What factors affect the cost of hornet removal in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: Pricing between $350-$550 depends on nest size, location accessibility, height requiring specialized equipment, and the number of hornets present. Nests in difficult-to-reach areas like tall trees or inside wall voids may be at the higher end of the range.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your household. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during treatment and for a brief period afterward, typically 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee hornets won't return after removal?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a service guarantee. After removing the nest and treating the area, we offer follow-up inspections to ensure complete elimination. We also provide recommendations to prevent future hornet activity on your Cortlandt property.
